mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant_db_config (id, tenant_id, db_name, jdbc_url, db_username, db_password, db_driver_class_name, enabled, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{dbName}, #{jdbcUrl}, #{dbUsername}, #{dbPassword}, #{dbDriverClassName}, #{enabled}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, db_name, jdbc_url, db_username, db_password, db_driver_class_name, enabled, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user FROM tenant_db_config WHERE enabled = 1

SELECT id, tenant_id, db_name, jdbc_url, db_username, db_password, db_driver_class_name, enabled, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user FROM tenant_db_config WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} LIMIT 1
SELECT tenant_id FROM tenant_db_config WHERE enabled = 1
SELECT id, org_id FROM tenant WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND org_id IS NOT NULL AND org_id != ''
